heading: Definition
label: 2113 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, the terms “State court”, “State courts”, and “highest court of a State” include the District of Columbia Court of Appeals.
notes: Effective DateSection effective the first day of the seventh calendar month which begins after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1970 Amendment note under .July 29, 1970section 199(a) of Pub. L. 91–358section 1257 of this title
